repo.description: Pre-built ARM/Linux C cross-compilers for MacOS

terms.context_snippet: Building cross-compiler toolchains is a time-consuming process. This site provides pre-built cross-compiler toolchains for Apple Mac OS X (i.e. Darwin), targetting the Linux operating system on common architectures, currently `arm` and `aarch64`. In other words, compile code for…
